title: cornus elliptica
intro: Cornus elliptica, also known as the Pagoda Dogwood, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cornaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to reduce swelling and fight off free radicals in the body. The health benefits of Cornus elliptica include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost immune function, and even exhibit antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
